purpose: Replace the Phase3CP controlled CM fixture with the real true-1min Phase3CM train portfolio Sortino reward audit on a bounded small loop.

phase3cp-real-cm-small-loop.role: read CP/CO arm budgets, generate bounded candidates, pass CA, field-gate against true1min shards, run real Phase3CM train reward, build CN feedback memory, and emit next CO budgets

hard_rules: shard_root must exist and must not contain suspicious old 1D path markers
CM field gate must reject candidates whose expression fields are not available in the selected true1min shard schemas
CM reward output lineage must preserve candidate_id and generator_arm from the CM input table
real Phase3CM train reward is the only feedback source for CN in this route
holdout is report-only and does not feed CN or CO
this small loop is diagnostic and not alpha proof
exit_gate_for_small_loop: generated candidate count equals requested generation budget
at least one CA candidate passes true1min field gate
CM lineage consistency check reports zero mismatches
CN memory rows match Phase3CM candidate count
next CO budget allocation equals requested reschedule budget

selection_modes.ca_ranked: use CA-ranked order for CM candidate limit
selection_modes.arm_balanced: round-robin CM candidates across generator arms after CA and field gate

verified_runs.notable_near_pass: event_state candidate phase3cp_00030 has positive train/validation/holdout Sortino but fails turnover gate

next_phase: Do not enter Phase3CQ yet; rerun Phase3CP with lower-turnover event-state/fresh variants first
